issues.description: TrashFromHand should be optional (conditional). DSL structure does not properly express 'You may trash 1 card' — the action should be wrapped in a conditional or optional modifier, not a hard requirement.
Second effect (Trigger + GiveDon) has no basis in card text. The card text does not mention gaining Don tokens. This effect should be removed entirely.

Target scope is correct (ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader) but the thenActions structure implies the PowerBoost only happens if trash occurs. The card text 'You may trash 1 card: [effect]' means the power boost is conditional on the optional trash action, which is correctly modeled by thenActions, but the first effect's overall structure needs clarification that trash is optional.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle.
